subcodes.first_line: O Javád! We have hearkened unto thy call from thy letter, and illumined its horizon with Our remembrance, which, when it appeared, caused all to be shaken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد قد سمعنا ندائک من کتابک و نورنا افقه بذکری الذی اذا ظهر اضطربت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
